product.description: PowerUp Money is India's trusted Mutual Fund Advisory App that helps users select, review, and rebalance their mutual funds with expert advice and 20 years of data. The app is designed to keep investment portfolios in top form.

features.name: Expert Advice
features.description: Provides expert guidance for mutual fund investments.

features.name: Mutual Fund Selection
features.description: Helps users select appropriate mutual funds.

features.name: Mutual Fund Review
features.description: Allows users to review their existing mutual funds.

features.name: Mutual Fund Rebalancing
features.description: Facilitates the rebalancing of mutual fund portfolios.

features.name: Portfolio Optimization
features.description: Aims to keep the user's portfolio in top form.

product.targeted_market: Indian investors who are looking for expert guidance and tools to manage their mutual fund portfolios effectively. This includes individuals who want to select, review, and rebalance their investments with data-driven insights.
product.problem_product_is_solving: The app addresses the challenges individuals face in selecting the right mutual funds, understanding their portfolio's performance, and knowing when and how to rebalance it to achieve optimal results. It aims to simplify mutual fund management through expert advice and historical data.
